zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Plumpton於大約1295年出生在英國越可爾斯波福斯時，他的父親Robert De Plumpton III28歲，母親Lucia De Ross26歲。他於1334年6月30日之前與Christina Mowbray結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1349年被列為sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於1362年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Plumpton was born about 1295, in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert De Plumpton III, was 28 and his mother, Lucia De Ross, was 26. He married Christina Mowbray before 30 June 1334. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1349, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as sheriff of yorkshire. He died in 1362, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Plumpton est né environ 1295, à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Plumpton III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lucia De Ross, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Christina Mowbray avant 30 juin 1334. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1349, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé en 1362, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Plumpton um 1295 in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Plumpton III 28 und seine Mutter Lucia De Ross 26. Er hat vor 30. Juni 1334 Christina Mowbray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1349, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Plumpton è nato il circa 1295 nel Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert De Plumpton III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lucia De Ross, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Christina Mowbray prima del 30 giugno 1334. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1349, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of yorkshire. Morì nel 1362, nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Plumptonが約1295年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプオフォースで生まれた時，父Robert De Plumpton IIIは28歳，母Lucia De Rossは26歳であった。1334年6月30日以前にChristina Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1349年，55歳の時，職業はsheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1362年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Plumpton(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Plumpton III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia De Ross(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1334년 6월 30일 이전 Christina Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1349년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Plumpton nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Plumpton III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lucia De Ross, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Mowbray antes 30 de junho de 1334. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1349, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of yorkshire. Ele faleceu em 1362, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Plumpton родился около 1295 г. в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert De Plumpton III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia De Ross, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Mowbray перед 30 июнь 1334 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1349 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Christina Mowbray antes de 30 de junio de 1334. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1349, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of yorkshire. Murió en 1362, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
